~/.ssh/id_ed25519 → nmadmin@server
 → debadmin@172.22.0.20" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="420" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="host" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8" value="Hyper-V Host — 'server' (Windows Server 2025, PowerShell 7.6)
D:\ISO = /Volumes/ISO · D:\Lab\ holds VM VHDX files" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="410" width="1020" x="40" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="extsw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;dashed=1;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle" value="<b>External: PCI 1G Port 1</b>

TEMP — attached only during
prepare-image (internet for apt);
removed for golden-image snapshot" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="290" x="60" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="intsw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle" value="<b>Internal: Lab-Internal</b> (172.22.0.0/24, no NAT)
Host vNIC: 172.22.0.1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="660" x="380" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wsdc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;align=center;spacingTop=8" value="<b>WS2025-DC1</b> · 172.22.0.10

Windows Server 2025 Standard Eval
Server Core · FFL = WinThreshold (2016)

<i>lab.test</i> forest root

MSFT WS2025-2602 Security Baseline
linked to OU=Domain Controllers
(LDAP sign + channel binding, SMB sign,
Kerberos AES, Defender, VBS, Domain Security)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="250" width="430" x="80" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sambadc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;align=center;spacingTop=8" value="<b>samba-dc1</b> · 172.22.0.20

Debian 13 Trixie (minimal)
Samba 4.22.8 AD DC
PowerShell 7.6 · chrony · hyperv-daemons

Joined to <i>lab.test</i> as additional DC
<code>smb.conf: ad dc functional level = 2016</code>

samba-sconfig TUI at /usr/local/sbin/" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="250" width="430" x="580" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrM2H" edge="1" parent="1" source="mac" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=10;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.15;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0" target="host" value="ssh nmadmin@server
(key-based, PowerShell 7.6)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrM2S" edge="1" parent="1" source="mac" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=10;dashed=1;strokeColor=#0066cc;strokeWidth=1.5;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0" target="sambadc" value="ssh -J nmadmin@server
debadmin@172.22.0.20"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="795" y="130" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrH2W" edge="1" parent="1" source="intsw" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=10;exitX=0.3;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0" target="wsdc" value="PSDirect
(VMBus)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrRep" edge="1" parent="1" source="wsdc" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=10;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#b85450;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0" target="sambadc" value="AD replication (DRSUAPI RPC) · Kerberos · LDAP(S) · SMB · DNS
<i>bidirectional — after PTR record for 172.22.0.20 on WS2025</i>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flowtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" value="Test execution flow (single end-to-end pass)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="400" x="40" y="565" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8" value="<b>T1 — Smoke</b>

revert golden-image → boot
services disabled ✓
samba-sconfig present ✓
pwsh 7.6 ✓

<i>note: chrony NTP pools
unreachable on isolated net</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="230" x="50" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8" value="<b>T2 — Join WS2025 as DC</b>

1st attempt:
<font color="#b85450">WERR_DS_INCOMPATIBLE_VERSION</font>
(OS-FL 4 vs forest-FL 7)

<b>Fix:</b> --option=&quot;ad dc
functional level = 2016&quot;

2nd attempt: <b>joined ✓</b>
samba-ad-dc active, TGT OK" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="230" x="300" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8" value="<b>T3 — Replication + Functional</b>

inbound (WS→Samba): clean ✓
outbound: <font color="#b85450">8524 DNS err</font>

<b>Fix:</b> PTR 20 →
samba-dc1.lab.test

Users + GPO objects replicate ✓
<i>SYSVOL: rsync fallback
(Samba has no DFSR)</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="230" x="550" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8" value="<b>T4 — Baseline compliance</b>

LDAP signing ✓
SMB signing ✓
Kerberos AES ✓

<font color="#cc6600">RC4 still issuable</font>
(baseline gap, not Samba)

LDAPS: self-signed,
no SAN, 2y expiry" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="230" x="800" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flowEdge1" edge="1" parent="1" source="t1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=1.5" target="t2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flowEdge2" edge="1" parent="1" source="t2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=1.5" target="t3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flowEdge3" edge="1" parent="1" source="t3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=1.5" target="t4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2" value="<b>Legend</b> &#9632; Mac/operator &#9632; Windows (host & VM) &#9632; Linux VM &#9632; Switch &#8213; bidirectional replication (after PTR fix)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="1020" x="40" y="810" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

revert golden-image → boot
services disabled ✓

pwsh 7.6 ✓
note: chrony NTP pools
unreachable on isolated net

div.div:
T2 — Join WS2025 as DC
1st attempt:
WERR_DS_INCOMPATIBLE_VERSION
(OS-FL 4 vs forest-FL 7)
Fix: --option="ad dc
functional level = 2016"
2nd attempt: joined ✓
samba-ad-dc active, TGT OK

div.div:
T3 — Replication + Functional
inbound (WS→Samba): clean ✓
outbound: 8524 DNS err
Fix: PTR 20 →
samba-dc1.lab.test
Users + GPO objects replicate ✓
SYSVOL: rsync fallback
(Samba has no DFSR)

div.div:
T4 — Baseline compliance
LDAP signing ✓
SMB signing ✓
Kerberos AES ✓
RC4 still issuable
(baseline gap, not Samba)
LDAPS: self-signed,
no SAN, 2y expiry
